creator: drum@graphica.com.au
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #88)
Hi Mark,

yes agree, I have re-tested with:

Ubuntu 22.04 with Libvirt/QEMU/Hypervisor: 8.0.0 / 8.0.0 / 6.2.0

Running VM Q35 Ver 6.2 and all of:

Disk:
SATA
Virtio
SCSI/Virtio

Network:
virtio
e1000e
vmxnet3

All working ok.

So closing "Overcome by Events" as fixed in current FreeBSD 13 version.

Thank you.

John Hartley
